svg.title: Motivation Chain: From Drivers to Requirements

g.text: Motivation Chain: From Drivers to Requirements
AI-Assisted Development as Dominant Production Mode
AI Code Generation Volume Outpaces Sequential Architectural Review Capacity
LLM-Based Agents Cannot Effectively Use Unstructured Architectural Knowledge
Centralized Governance Cannot Scale to Concurrent Development Contexts
Implicit System Interdependencies Are Unmaintainable Without Explicit Models
Support Technology Design Evolution and Validation for AI
Support Product Design Evolution and Validation for AI
AI Agents Efficiently Discover and Edit Architecture Artifacts
AI Agents Produce Fewer Architecture-Drift Corrections
AI Agents Query Technology Architecture to Identify Constraints
AI Agents Traverse Product-Architecture Traceability Chains
Architecture Governance Scales Without Proportional Coordination Overhead
